words.definition_vi: bỏ qua, không chú ý đến (một vấn đề, lời phàn nàn); coi thường
words.definition_en: to dismiss or ignore something without proper consideration
words.example_sentence: The government brushed aside concerns about environmental damage in favor of economic growth.

words.definition_vi: đàn áp, kiểm soát chặt chẽ; tấn công mạnh mẽ chống lại
words.definition_en: to take strict action to prevent or suppress something illegal or undesirable
words.example_sentence: Authorities are clamping down on illegal wildlife trafficking across the border.

words.definition_vi: đào sâu vào, tìm hiểu kỹ lưỡng; khám phá chi tiết
words.definition_en: to investigate or examine something thoroughly and in depth
words.example_sentence: The research team delved into historical archives to uncover the origins of the disease.

words.definition_vi: chống lại, đẩy lùi; tự vệ chống lại (tấn công, chỉ trích)
words.definition_en: to defend oneself against or ward off an attack, criticism, or unwanted advance
words.example_sentence: The company had to fend off multiple takeover bids from rival corporations.

words.definition_vi: che giấu, làm nhẹ đi; không đề cập chi tiết đến (vấn đề khó xử)
words.definition_en: to treat something serious as unimportant or to avoid discussing it in detail
words.example_sentence: Critics argued that the report glossed over the systemic failures that led to the crisis.

words.definition_vi: tập trung vào, nhắm vào; xác định chính xác
words.definition_en: to focus attention on or move toward a specific target or objective
words.example_sentence: Investigators honed in on the suspect's financial records as key evidence.

words.definition_vi: nắm bắt, chú ý đến; bám vào (ý tưởng, cơ hội)
words.definition_en: to seize upon or become attached to an idea, opportunity, or person
words.example_sentence: Consumers latched onto the new sustainable product line as soon as it hit the market.

words.definition_vi: kiểm soát, hạn chế; kéo lại (chi tiêu, quyền lực)
words.definition_en: to control or limit something that is growing too fast or becoming excessive
words.example_sentence: The central bank is attempting to rein in inflation through stricter monetary policies.

words.definition_vi: sàng lọc, lọc ra; xem xét kỹ lưỡng từng phần
words.definition_en: to examine or sort through information, documents, or data carefully to find what is relevant
words.example_sentence: Researchers sifted through thousands of documents to identify patterns in consumer behavior.

words.definition_vi: dần dần giảm bớt, xói mòn; làm giảm dần
words.definition_en: to gradually reduce or diminish something in size, amount, or importance over time
words.example_sentence: Budget cuts have whittled away at the university's research funding over the past decade.
